name: cmlibs-argon
documentation:
# CMLibs Argon

The core data structures for GUI applications using Zinc [cmlibs.org](https://cmlibs.org).

methods.name: cmlibs.argon.argonlogger.CustomStreamImpl.flush
documentation: Note: if implementing __init__ you must call super __init__ for Signals to work.
def __init__(self):
super(CustomStreamImpl, self).__init__()

methods.name: cmlibs.argon.argondocument.ArgonDocument._regionChange
documentation:
If root region has changed, set its new Zinc region as Zinc context's default region.
\:param changedRegion: The top region changed
\:param treeChange: True if structure of tree, or zinc objects reconstructed

documentation:
Read the JSON description to the argon document object. This will change the settings of ArgonDocument Object.

methods.name: cmlibs.argon.argondocument.ArgonDocument.serialize
documentation:
Write the JSON file describing the Argon document in the argon document object, which can be used to store the current argon document settings.

```
The base path of JSON file, default is None.

Python JSON object containing the JSON description of argon document object.
```


```
return

cmlibs.zinc.context.Context
```

methods.name: cmlibs.argon.argontessellations.ArgonTessellations.deserialize
documentation:
Read the JSON description to the Argon Tessellations object. This will change the tessellation in the Zinc tessellation module. 
Raising an ArgonError if Zinc tessellation module read JSON description failed.

:param  dictInput: The string containing JSON description

methods.name: cmlibs.argon.argontessellations.ArgonTessellations.serialize
documentation:
Write the JSON file describing the tessellations in the argon tessellation object, which can be used to store the current tessellation settings.

```
return

Python JSON object containing the JSON description of argon tessellation object, otherwise 0.
```
Manages and serializes Zinc Tessellations within Neon.

methods.name: cmlibs.argon.argonviews.ArgonViewManager.addViewByType
documentation:
Create a new view with given view layout type, there are two available types:
LAYOUT1 for view with single sceneviewer, LAYOUT2x2GRID for view with four sceneviewers.

```
param view_type

View layout type.

param name

Name of the new view, default is None. If it is None, will use view type as name.
```

methods.name: cmlibs.argon.argonviews.ArgonViewManager.removeView
documentation:
Remove view by given identifier.

```
param identifier

The identifier of view.
```

documentation:
Update sceneviewer info in the view.

```
param view_index

The index of view that need to be updated.

param sceneviewers_info

New sceneviewers info.
```
Manages and serializes ArgonViews.

documentation:
Return the zinc Context of current argon spectrum.

```
return

cmlibs.zinc.context.Context
```

methods.name: cmlibs.argon.argonspectrums.ArgonSpectrums.deserialize
documentation:
Read the JSON description to the Argon spectrum object. This will change the spectrums in the Zinc spectrum module. 
Raising an ArgonError if Zinc spectrum module read JSON description failed.

:param  dictInput: The string containing JSON description

methods.name: cmlibs.argon.argonspectrums.ArgonSpectrums.serialize
documentation:
Write the JSON file describing the spectrums in the argon spectrum object, which can be used to store the current spectrum settings.

```
return

Python JSON object containing the JSON description of argon spectrum object, otherwise 0.
```

methods.name: cmlibs.argon.argonspectrums.ArgonSpectrums._findOrCreateAllSpectrumGlyphColourBars
documentation: Ensures there exists a colour bar for each spectrum.

methods.name: cmlibs.argon.argonspectrums.ArgonSpectrums._findSpectrumGlyphColourBar
documentation:
Find or create a GlyphColourBar for spectrum in the glyph module.
Newly created colour bar is set up for display in the normalised window coordinates at left.

methods.name: cmlibs.argon.argonspectrums.ArgonSpectrums.findOrCreateSpectrumGlyphColourBar
documentation:
Find or create a GlyphColourBar for spectrum in the glyph module.
Newly created colour bar is set up for display in the normalised window coordinates at left.

```
param spectrum

The spectrum that the colour bar belongs to.
```

methods.name: cmlibs.argon.argonspectrums.ArgonSpectrums.renameSpectrum
documentation:
Renames spectrum and its glyph

```
param spectrum

The spectrum that need to be renamed.

param name

New name to the spectrum.

return

True on success, otherwise False (means name not set)
```

methods.name: cmlibs.argon.argonspectrums.ArgonSpectrums.removeSpectrumByName
documentation:
Unmanages spectrum and its colour bar. Note spectrum is only removed if neither are in use.

```
return

True if spectrum and colour bar removed, false if failed i.e. either are in use.
```

Manages and serializes Zinc Spectrums within Neon.
Generates colour bar glyphs for spectrums, which is automatically done if if not found on loading.

methods.name: cmlibs.argon.argonregion.ArgonRegion.freeContents
documentation: Deletes subobjects of region to help free memory held by Zinc objects earlier.
def __del__(self):
print("NeonRegion.__del__ " + self.getDisplayName())

methods.name: cmlibs.argon.argonregion.ArgonRegion._assign
documentation: Replace contents of self with that of source. Fixes up Zinc parent/child region relationships.

methods.name: cmlibs.argon.argonregion.ArgonRegion._informRegionChange
documentation:
Called by regions when their tree structure changes or zinc regions are rebuilt.
Informs registered clients of change. Root region handle these signals for whole tree.

methods.name: cmlibs.argon.argonregion.ArgonRegion.connectRegionChange
documentation:
Request callbacks on region tree changes.

```
param callableObject

Callable object taking a NeonRegion argument and a boolean flag which is True if tree
structure below region needs to be rebuilt.
```

methods.name: cmlibs.argon.argonregion.ArgonRegion._reload
documentation:
Must be called when already-loaded model source modified or deleted.
Saves and reloads region tree, starting at ancestor if this region was created by its model source.

methods.name: cmlibs.argon.argonregion.ArgonRegion._discoverNewZincRegions
documentation:
Ensure there are Neon regions for every Zinc Region in tree.

```
return

Number of new descendant regions created
```
